ksa_text: Skill in interpreting regulatory text, supervisory guidance, and enforcement decisions, translating legal requirements into operational controls and measurable organizational obligations.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ability to interpret and apply laws, regulations, policies, and guidance relevant to organization cyber objectives.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of targeting laws and regulations

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Ability to interpret and apply laws, regulations, policies, and guidance relevant to organization cyber objectives.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RC-S-002 (Risk and Compliance) scores 0.457 composite (signal: moderate). Scope fit for Cloud Data Architect: out_of_scope. Preliminary decision: exclude.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Out-of-scope exclusion is internally consistent. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Risk and Compliance KSA RC-S-002 as a discrete competency for Cloud Data Architect?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA excluded at Pass 2 (scope: out_of_scope) or Pass 3. No market evidence warrants reversal for Cloud Data Architect.

decision_rationale: Risk and Compliance is out of scope for Cloud Data Architect.
